name: Zesty Barbecued Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, cook ribs in boiling water for 45 to 60 minutes, or until tender.
2. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients; simmer uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Grill or broil ribs as desired, turning and basting frequently with sauce.
4. Refrigerate leftovers.
MICROWAVE:
To pre-cook ribs, place 1 1/2 lbs of ribs in a 12 x 7-inch shallow baking dish. Add 1/4 cup water. Cover with vented plastic wrap. Microwave on full power (high) for 5 minutes.
Reduce to 1/2 power (medium); continue cooking for 7 minutes. Turn ribs over and cook covered at 1/2 power (medium) for another 7 minutes longer.
Repeat with remaining ribs. Proceed as above.
